mapper.sql: id, inviter_user_id, invitee_user_id, reward_status, reward_granted_at, trigger_biz_no, skip_reason, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, version
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM invite_relation WHERE invitee_user_id = #{inviteeUserId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO invite_relation (inviter_user_id, invitee_user_id, reward_status) VALUES (#{inviterUserId}, #{inviteeUserId}, 'PENDING')
mapper.update: UPDATE invite_relation SET reward_status = 'GRANTED', reward_granted_at = NOW(), trigger_biz_no = #{triggerBizNo}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE invitee_user_id = #{inviteeUserId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM invite_relation WHERE inviter_user_id = #{inviterUserId} AND reward_status = 'GRANTED' AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM invite_relation WHERE inviter_user_id = #{inviterUserId} AND reward_status = 'GRANTED' AND DATE(reward_granted_at) = CURDATE() AND deleted_at IS NULL
